{{Infobox character
| name = Li Markuth
| aliases = Markuth
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|call wind aura, living storms bound in his wings, song stored in his heart that can shatter minds, sword that can cut through space, weapon that is compatible with storm madra and acts like a sentient parasite, song from his heart that forms invisible razors, [[Ruler technique]], [[Striker technique]], [[Forger technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Grand Patriarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, winged terror}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Archlord]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li clan|Li Clan]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cradle]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Li Markuth Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li]] Markuth, also known as Markuth, is a powerful figure within the [[Li clan]], serving as its [[Grand Patriarch]] and later as its [[Grand Elder]]. A winged combatant capable of manipulating wind, shadow, and [[vital aura]], he possesses significant strength and has mastered techniques from various worlds. During a violent confrontation in an arena, Markuth killed the [[Wei clan]]'s Patriarch by decapitating him and extracted a heart from Sairus as part of a vendetta against the Wei lineage. Following this conflict, he was banished by Suriel. After several years of preparation and ascension beyond his previous rank of [[Archlord]], Markuth returned to [[Cradle]] through the [[Way]]. Seeking to restore his clan's status and lead its elders, he aims to demonstrate his superior power and eventually cooperate with the [[Abidan]] by providing them with information.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|As the [[Grand Patriarch]] of the [[Li]] Clan, [[Li]] Markuth is a [[Gold]] whose body is partially composed of [[madra]]. He is characterized by his white-striped hair and the ability to gather [[madra]] into balls of force. His massive wings, which feature black veins, can extend fifteen feet on either side of him. Driven by the intent to claim all of [[Sacred Valley]] as his own personal territory, he was eventually sentenced to trial for attempting to dominate local inhabitants and committing spatial violations.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]] is the [[Grand Patriarch]] of the [[Li]] Clan.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]] is a [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]] has black-veined white wings.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]]'s wings extend to fifteen feet on either side of the Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]] intends to claim the whole of [[Sacred Valley]] as his personal territory.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Gold]] bodies are partially made of [[madra]], like a [[Remnant]]'s.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]] is a man with white-striped hair and [[madra]] gathered in balls of force.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Li Markuth]] was sentenced to trial for spatial violation and attempted domination of local inhabitants.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Li Markuth]] is someone who has died.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Li Markuth]] is a winged terror that Suriel banished.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Archlord]] upon his departure from [[Cradle]], [[Li]] Markuth possesses dim white flesh that radiates an unrestrained hunger. He wields a [[sword]] capable of cutting through space alongside a sentient, parasitic weapon designed for compatibility with storm [[madra]]. His combat abilities include calling wind [[aura]], forming emerald cyclones through [[Striker techniques]], and manifesting an ancient warrior's fist using dark green wind madra via [[Forger techniques]]. Markuth further utilizes a [[Ruler technique]] fueled by [[soulfire]] and otherworldly wisdom to manipulate air pressure, while the song stored within his heart can shatter minds or manifest as invisible razors. Additionally, living storms are bound within his wings.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] can call wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] was an [[Archlord]] when he left [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] has living storms bound in his wings.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] has a song stored in his heart that can shatter minds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]]'s flesh is dim white and emanates unrestrained hunger.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Markuth uses a [[sword]] that can cut through space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Markuth created a weapon that is compatible with storm [[madra]] and acts like a sentient parasite.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Markuth uses a song from his heart that forms invisible razors.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Markuth uses a [[Ruler technique]] fueled with [[soulfire]] and wisdom from beyond the world to increase air pressure.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Markuth uses a [[Striker technique]] to form emerald cyclones.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Markuth uses a [[Forger technique]] in the shape of an ancient warrior's fist made from dark green wind madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Li clan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
